column1: 1.1,MetalTypes,Admin,Fail,"1) It does not appear that MetalType is being applied consistentently across the application.
2) There is no mechanism to maintain MetalType","MetalType should be a table based configurable (by admin) construct that is consistenly used across the application"

1.2,MetalForms,Admin,Fail,"1) It does not appear that MetalForm is being applied consistentently across the application. 2) There is no mechanism to maintain MetalForm,MetalForm should be a table based configurable (by admin) construct that is consistenly used across the application

1.3,ProductProfileMapping,Admin,Pass,Currently the mapping screen for both live price and product listing to product profiles uses lib/features/live_prices/presentation/sreens/live_price_mapping_screen.dart.  Given this is a shared mapping screen with Product Listings.  We should move it to lib/features/product_profiles/presentation/screens/product_profile_mapping_screen.dart.,No further action at this time
1.4,Legacy Code,Admin,,lib/features/scraper/ is legacy code that is being used and must be removed.,
2.1,Sorting,Admin,Improvement,We are currently restricted to sorting using 2 columns.,Sorting on any combinations of columns

2.2,Filter,Admin,Fail,"1) The filter does not always appear in the action bar (Holdings). 2) The filter uses different icons on the analytics screens to the rest of the app.3) There is inconsistency in how filters are presented across screens (eg: MetalType is sometimes a verticle multi selection list and sometimes a horizontal single selection.  MetalForm is the same.)","1) The filter should only ever be displayed in the action bar. 2) The filter should use the same icon every time it is displayed. 3) Every filter should have the same look and feel and use common shared fuctions like MetalTypeSelector; RetailerSelector; MetalFormSelector; etc. It must be noted that every screen will require its unique set of filerable elements but they must always appear in the same order unless stipulated."
